product_overview: NurseQuest is a gamified web app that helps nursing students learn via quizzes, live multiplayer sessions, and progression tracking while giving educators tools to create and run interactive assessments.
core_goals: Enable students to practice nursing scenarios and quizzes in a game-like, engaging format to improve retention.
Allow educators to create, configure, and launch quizzes for synchronous (live) or asynchronous use.
Provide real-time multiplayer sessions where students join by code and compete with instant scoring and leaderboards.
Surface individual and cohort-level progress (XP, levels, streaks) so users and teachers can track learning over time.
Let users personalize their presence with a customizable avatar that appears across the app.

features.name: Authentication (Login & Register)
features.description: Allow users to sign in or register with a role (student or teacher) so they can access personalized dashboards and creation tools.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Enter name -> Select role -> Click Login or Register -> See /dashboard when authentication succeeds
Navigate to / -> Enter name only -> Click Login or Register -> See validation error requesting missing fields

features.name: Avatar Setup
features.description: Let authenticated users customize and save a visual avatar that represents them in the app and during live sessions.
user_flows: Navigate to /avatar-setup -> Choose avatar attributes (appearance, colors) -> Save avatar -> Navigate to /dashboard -> See updated avatar and profile reflected on dashboard

features.name: View Dashboard (Student Analytics)
features.description: Present users with their current progression metrics and recent activity so they can monitor learning progress.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View stats (XP, Level, active streak) -> Open recent quiz attempts from dashboard -> See scores and timestamps for recent attempts

features.name: Quiz Builder
features.description: Enable educators to create and configure quizzes (questions, difficulty, time limits, and media) for use in solo or live sessions.
user_flows: Navigate to /quiz-builder -> Create a new quiz with title and settings -> Add one or more questions with types and time limits -> Save quiz -> Navigate to /dashboard -> See newly created quiz listed in recent or available quizzes
Navigate to /quiz-builder -> Attempt to save quiz without a title -> See validation error prompting for quiz title

features.name: Live Session (Host and Join)
features.description: Provide synchronous gameplay where a host launches a quiz, students join with a join code, and everyone sees questions and live leaderboards in real time.
user_flows: Navigate to /live -> Select an existing quiz to host -> Start live session -> See generated join code -> Control question progression -> See live leaderboard update after each question
Navigate to /live -> Enter join code -> Join the live session -> Receive questions in sync with the host -> Answer questions as they appear -> See live leaderboard updates after each question
